mapper.sql: FROM `class` c LEFT JOIN teacher ht ON c.head_teacher_id = ht.id LEFT JOIN teacher ct ON c.chinese_teacher_id = ct.id LEFT JOIN teacher mt ON c.math_teacher_id = mt.id LEFT JOIN teacher et ON c.english_teacher_id = et.id

WHERE 1=1
AND c.class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.className}, '%')
AND ht.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.headTeacherName}, '%')
AND c.status = #{query.status}
mapper.select: SELECT id, class_name AS className FROM `class` WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id

SELECT c.*, ht.name AS headTeacherName, ct.name AS chineseTeacherName, mt.name AS mathTeacherName, et.name AS englishTeacherName
ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `class`
class_name, head_teacher_id, chinese_teacher_id, math_teacher_id, english_teacher_id, status, description,
#{className}, #{headTeacherId}, #{chineseTeacherId}, #{mathTeacherId}, #{englishTeacherId}, #{status}, #{description},
